name: Chicken'n Rice in a Bag
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinch chicken pieces and pat dry; set aside.
2. Combine rice, cream of chicken soup, and water in a Crock-Pot; stir well to mix ingredients.
3. Place chicken pieces in a see-through roasting bag; add onion soup mix. Shake the bag to coat chicken pieces thoroughly.
4. Puncture 5 to 6 holes in the bottom of the bag.
5. Fold the top of the bag over the chicken and place it in the Crock-Pot on top of the rice.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
7. Remove chicken pieces to a warm platter.
8. Serve with rice.
Serves 4
